title: Migration-mapping manifest (migrate mode)
description: Translate ONE source platform's concepts to ONE target's concepts. Deterministic rows run as declared transforms; strategy:model and unmapped:model rows hand off to the build; the rest land in the gap report. DRAFT 2026-06-29 — ahead of the consuming engine; see docs/design/aira-capability-manifests.md sec.9b. Not yet wired into validate.mjs.

from.description: source platform id (matches a source-adapter id)

unmapped.description: what to do with concepts not in map; model-first by default
